description: Reframe existing analysis for a different audience without changing the evidence
usage: rewrite for a different audience, explain to non-technical, tailor this for, adapt for executives

target.description: What content to reframe (reads matching artifacts from workspace)

audience.description: Who this is for: executive, engineer, investor, non-technical, regulator, academic

purpose.description: What the audience should do after reading: decide, fund, build, approve, understand
